issueTitle: Create a static HTML landing page
issueBody:
## Summary
Create a single-page static HTML landing page for a fictional SaaS product called "Beacon".

## Requirements
- Create `index.html` at the root of the repository
- Create `style.css` at the root with all styles (no frameworks, plain CSS only)
- The page must include:
  - A top navigation bar with the logo text "Beacon" on the left and a "Get started" button on the right
  - A hero section with the headline "Ship faster. Break less." and a subheading "Beacon monitors your deploys and alerts your team in real time." plus a primary CTA button "Start free trial"
  - A features section with 3 cards: "Instant alerts" (description: Get notified in Slack, email, or SMS within seconds of a failed deploy), "Deploy history" (description: Every deploy logged with diffs, duration, and who triggered it), "Team dashboards" (description: One place for your whole team to see what shipped and when)
  - A footer with copyright text "© 2026 Beacon. All rights reserved."
- Color scheme: dark navy background (`#0f172a`), white text, accent color `#6366f1` (indigo) for buttons and highlights
- The page must be responsive (mobile-friendly using CSS media queries)
- No JavaScript required
